title: scolochloa donax
intro: Scolochloa donax, also known as giant hairgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to China and Eastern Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scolochloa donax include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. Scolochloa donax can be prepared as a tea or decoction, and it is also used in herbal medicine to make capsules or tinctures for various health issues.
